code:
import io
import string

fn byte_or_neg(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  while i < n
    mut j = i
    while j < n and byte_or_neg(input, j) != 10
      j = j + 1
    end
    mut k = i
    while k < j and is_ws(byte_or_neg(input, k))
      k = k + 1
    end
    while k < j and not is_ws(byte_or_neg(input, k))
      k = k + 1
    end
    while k < j and is_ws(byte_or_neg(input, k))
      k = k + 1
    end
    mut tok_start = k
    while k < j and not is_ws(byte_or_neg(input, k))
      k = k + 1
    end
    if tok_start < k
      let tok = string.substring(input, tok_start, k)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        total = total + v
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = j + 1
  end
  print("sum=#{total}")
end
